data.text: @github GitHub banning my account for forking a legitimate repository a month ago was probably the best warning sign possible. It proved early on that the platform simply can’t be trusted — not its policies, not its stability, and definitely not its security.

note_tweet.text:
1/ We are sharing additional details regarding our investigation into unauthorized access to GitHub's internal repositories.

Yesterday we detected and contained a compromise of an employee device involving a poisoned VS Code extension. We removed the malicious extension version, isolated the endpoint, and began incident response immediately.
